title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Momonosuke, Kaido, Unknown person #2, Orochi, Unknown person #3 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Luffy, wait! That can't be done!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I know you will find a way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to revive the Kozuki clan in the future!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Very well. I'll take this one head on.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This has been a lawless Land Since then!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've waited all this time for you "saviors" to show up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't worry, it's okay to let go.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I assure you I won't run!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
